question.label: Normal pace
question.name: What would make that pace start feeling normal from your read?
question.description: Drills into her concern about the push becoming the default and surfaces the pattern or signals she is worried about.

answer: I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.

assessment.note: Names lingering fragmentation even after overload eased, signalling sustained drag and inefficiency rather than renewed momentum.

new_queue.label: Fragmented calendar
new_queue.name: What's fragmenting your calendar most right now?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Priority tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
